Scared Fire may destroy unwanted insects in the house. Our
Rishis of the past have deduced that the smoke from the Sacred
Fire is good for health, which removes many health problems.
Scented sticks, sandalwood sticks while burning emanate a
pleasant smell. Police use irritating gas to disperse for preventing
disturbance. The smoke emanating from the Sacred Fire has
elemental factors and values that reach the etherial ups and is
considered a blessing factor for the benefit of the universe.
